case_title: ALBERT TOM et al VS. MICHAEL SOON AKA MICHAEL CRAIG et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Entry Of Default Judgemnt;
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Harrison Nam, Esq. for plaintiff(s) Albert Tom and Denyu Tom.
Plaintiff's Witness: Albert Tome was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Michael Soon aka Michael Craig for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $5541.62
Attorney's Fees and Costs - $14,178.50
Total judgment in the amount of $20,720.12
and Statutory penalty of $500.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
